channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PM Shehbaz declines proposed fuel price hike amid global oil crisis
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif announced on Friday that he had once again rejected a proposal to raise the prices of petrol and high-speed diesel (HSD), despite significant pressure caused by the ongoi...

item.title: Police Report Alleges Illegal Spending and Political Interference in NITR ₦391 Million Fraud Case
item.description: SaharaReporters don uncover one big corruption matter for the Nigerian Institute for Trypanosomiasis Research (NITR). According to leaked papers and police report, the Overseeing Director-General, Dr....

item.title: One Nation projected to gain second seat as SA election reshapes state politics
item.description: According to ABC projections, Pauline Hanson’s One Nation is set to secure a second lower house seat in South Australia, marking the party’s first success of this kind outside Queensland. The party’s ...

item.title: Airport Police Set To Honour Fallen Officers And Strengthen Community Ties For 2026 National Police Day
item.description: The Airport Police Command don roll out their schedule for the 2026 National Police Day celebration wey go hold from March 30 to April 7, 2026. The theme for this year na 'Community Partnership: Build...

item.title: Weekly Good Weekend quiz encourages readers to test their general knowledge
item.description: The article promotes The Age’s weekly Good Weekend quiz, inviting readers to test their general knowledge in a light-hearted and engaging way. Written by Brian Yatman, this edition of the quiz was rel...

item.title: ODM Leaders Hold Separate Political Meetings in Nairobi Amid Party Rift
item.description: In Nairobi, divisions within Kenya’s Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) came out clearly as Secretary-General Edwin Sifuna and Siaya Senator Oburu Oginga led opposing meetings on the same day. Both lead...

item.title: Understanding Delayed Realisation in Sexual Assault Victims
item.description: MP Charlotte Nichols recently spoke publicly in Parliament about her experiences with the criminal justice system following her rape trial, which took 1,088 days to reach court. She highlighted that t...

item.title: Philippine Navy avoids near-collision with Chinese warship near Pag-asa Island
item.description: MANILA — The Philippine Navy narrowly avoided a maritime collision with a Chinese warship near Pag-asa Island, according to the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP). The incident occurred when the BR...

item.title: PM Shehbaz refuses proposed hike in petrol and diesel rates amid global oil crisis
item.description: On Friday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif announced that he had rejected yet another recommendation to raise petrol and high-speed diesel (HSD) prices in Pakistan. According to the summary he received,...

item.title: Hackers tied to Iran reportedly access FBI Director Kash Patel’s private email account
item.description: According to Reuters, a group of hackers believed to be linked to Iran claimed they had gained access to the personal email inbox of Kash Patel, the FBI Director. The group, known as Handala Hack Team...

item.title: Wallaroos start season with strong debut performance against Fiji
item.description: The Wallaroos kicked off their season with a 33-15 victory over Fiji at GIO Stadium in Canberra, showcasing promising performances from several debutants. The match was competitive, with Australia hol...

item.title: Mass Defections and Shifting Alliances Ahead of Nigeria's 2027 Elections
item.description: Nigeria’s political scene don dey shake well-well as politicians from both small and big parties dey cross carpet ahead of the 2027 general elections. The movement no be one-way like before – people d...

item.title: Olive Ridley Turtle Nesting Conservation Efforts on Hope Island Protect Nearly 20,000 Eggs
item.description: Wildlife authorities in Andhra Pradesh have successfully conserved around 20,000 Olive Ridley turtle eggs on Hope Island, a vital nesting habitat in the Kakinada Bay region. The conservation work was ...

item.title: US Ground Assault on Iran's Kharg Island: Risks and Potential Escalation
item.description: According to recent reports, US President Trump is considering deploying ground forces to seize Kharg Island, a crucial oil hub for Iran, located in the Persian Gulf. While the operation could be swif...

item.title: Vivienne Westwood retrospective showcases private collection at Bowes Museum
item.description: A major fashion exhibition at the Bowes Museum in Barnard Castle, County Durham, is showcasing the private collection of Vivienne Westwood enthusiast Peter Smithson, accumulated over three decades. Th...

item.title: US and Israeli Strikes on Iran Amid Failed Diplomacy and Lobbyist Pressure
item.description: On February 28, 2026, Iran was unexpectedly attacked despite ongoing diplomatic negotiations indicating a potential breakthrough in nuclear disarmament. Oman’s foreign minister had just announced that...

item.title: Pakistan finalises app-based fuel quota system for motorcycles and rickshaws to target subsidies
item.description: The federal government and all four provinces have reached agreement on immediately implementing a mobile application-based fuel quota system for two-wheelers and three-wheelers in Pakistan. The initi...

item.title: Kuwait backs Pakistan’s diplomatic role in mediating between the US and Iran
item.description: In a phone conversation held on Friday, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif briefed Kuwait’s Crown Prince Sheikh Sabah Al Khaled Al Hamad Al Sabah on Pakistan’s latest diplomatic initiative aimed at easing ...

item.title: Renovated East York home sells for $1.25 million after price adjustments
item.description: A recently renovated three-bedroom home in East York, Toronto, sold for $1.25 million after undergoing a series of pricing changes. Initially listed at $1,049,900 in mid-January 2026, the property att...

item.title: TotalEnergies reverses early diesel price increase after retailer opposition
item.description: TotalEnergies has withdrawn its plan to raise diesel prices by R8 a litre ahead of the official April fuel price adjustment, following opposition from the Fuel Retailers Association (FRA). The company...
